claim_reviewed: Sherco Solar III site shows full operational panels in high-res drone footage
observations: Custody chain was limited to a single forwarded source.
Origin trace compressed to a single root via forward.
unknowns: Whether the media originates from the claimed site.
Whether the image is raw, edited, or synthetic.
Whether panels are operational or merely visible.
Whether timestamp and witness data can be independently verified.

evidence_introduced.label: high_fidelity_media && !custody_chain
evidence_introduced.reason: High-fidelity media without complete custody chain defaults to insufficient evidence under v1.1.1.

evidence_introduced.label: multiple_sources && single_origin && !independent_verification
evidence_introduced.reason: Listed sources compressed to one origin path and did not establish independent corroboration.

curriculum_delta: Add combined gate example for high-fidelity media with source-lineage collapse.
Clarify that media hash alone does not establish custody or operational status.
Route synthetic tests separately from authentic external participant receipts.
